name: Currant Scones the Painted Table
recipeIngredient: 2 Sticks (8 oz) Cold butter, cut into tablespoon-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cut in butter with a pastry blender or with your fingers until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Add currants and milk; mix well.
4. Lightly whisk eggs and cream together; add to dry ingredients.
5. Combine with a large wooden spoon or by hand until dough barely holds together. It should be slightly sticky, not dry. If needed, add a little more cream.
6. Grease a baking sheet or line with parchment paper.
7. Portion the dough using an ice cream scoop or divide into two flattened disks.
8. Cut each disk into 8 triangular-shaped scones.
9. Place on prepared baking sheet and sprinkle tops with sugar.
10. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven about 20 minutes, until golden brown. Cool slightly before serving.
